title: baskervilla leptantha
intro: Baskervilla leptantha, also known as the 'Yellow Baskervilla', is a type of orchid native to Australia and New Guinea. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and pain, due to its containing compounds with anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Baskervilla leptantha include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with fever, such as headaches and body aches. In traditional herbal medicine, Baskervilla leptantha is often prepared by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to alleviate fever and other health issues.
